data.description: 'They are by far the best nation in the world, they haven't been beaten for 20 years’ Gavin Evans has been to China about 20 times to train with China's Table Tennis Team and spoke to CGTN about his experience and what he learnt whilst out there.

data.title: Experian Supports Industry Readiness Following FHFA and FHA Move Toward VantageScore 4.0 in Mortgage Origination
data.description: Costa Mesa, California - Experian affirms readiness for industry support post Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) and Federal Housing Administration (FHA) shift to VantageScore 4.0 for mortgage origination.

data.title: REI Systems Appoints Indunil Ranaviraja as Head of Mission Enablement and Innovation
data.description: A technology service provider based in Sterling, Virginia, has recently announced the appointment of Indunil Ranaviraja as the Head of Mission Enablement and Innovation. With 36 years of experience in delivering reliable and innovative solutions for government agencies, REI Systems aims to further enhance its services under Ranaviraja's leadership.

data.title: Lights Out Boston AC Kicks off the 2026 Sport Fishing Championship Season with a Big Win in Key West Classic
data.description: In Key West, Florida on April 22, 2026, the Lights Out Boston Anglers Club secured their first win of the 2026 Sport Fishing Championship season at the Key West Classic. The team had a successful three days with six sailfish catches, divided among five anglers. This victory added 450 points to their overall score in the championship.

data.title: Carrier Named One of America's Climate Leaders for Third Consecutive Year
data.description: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on April 22, 2026, Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), a prominent player in intelligent climate and energy solutions, has been honored on Earth Day by being included in USA Today's prestigious list of America's Climate Leaders. This marks the third consecutive year that Carrier Global Corporation has received this recognition, highlighting its commitment to environmental stewardship and sustainable practices.

data.title: Bitcoin Has 'Reset' And Will Soon Resume Being A Safe Haven, Anthony Pompliano Says
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has experienced a 12% decline over the last three months, according to industry experts. This drop is not viewed as a sign of weakness, but rather a necessary adjustment preceding a broader upward trend. Entrepreneur and investor Anthony Pompliano stated in an April 22 episode of The Pomp Podcast that Bitcoin is already in a bullish phase. The recent correction saw the price fall from around $126,000 to $60,000, which Pompliano believes helped reset market conditions for a subsequent increase. He highlighted Bitcoin's journey towards a... (remaining content can be accessed through Benzinga.com).

data.title: Global Offshore Wind Leaders Partner to Build Nova Scotia Supply Chain
data.description: In Madrid, Riggs Distler & Company, Smulders, and Cherubini Bridges & Structures have entered a strategic Teaming Agreement to aid in the production and distribution of offshore renewable energy infrastructure in Nova Scotia. This collaboration brings together expertise from the U.S. and Europe in offshore wind, along with existing Canadian fabrication capabilities. The aim is to expedite the growth of a domestic offshore wind supply chain.

data.title: New Study Reveals Retail Security Measures Are Driving Customers Away
data.description: A recent survey conducted by DALBAR and Competitor IQ has highlighted a significant issue within the retail sector, involving 500 North American shoppers. The survey, released in April 2026, reveals a problematic conflict between loss prevention strategies and the overall customer experience. The study sheds light on a costly tension that businesses are facing in this regard.

data.title: Justin Sun claims World Liberty Financial allegedly threatened to burn his WLFI tokens after investing in Trump's meme coin.
data.description: A lawsuit alleges that members of World Liberty Financial's team were upset by an investment in President Trump's meme coin. The specific investment amount remains undisclosed.

data.title: Rare Earth Trade Is Back: USAR, MP Stocks Climb — Here's Why
data.description: The rare earth trade experienced a resurgence on Monday, with USA Rare Earth Inc. (NASDAQ: USAR) and MP Materials Corp. (NYSE: MP) soaring due to a significant M&A deal and optimistic Wall Street coverage. USAR stock saw an increase, marking a positive trend. In a noteworthy development, USA Rare Earth announced a substantial $2.8 billion acquisition of Brazilian mining company Serra Verde Group. This acquisition includes the Pela Ema mine, which stands out as the sole major producer of neodymium, praseodymium, dysprosium, and terbium outside of Asia. The deal involves $300 million in cash along with the issuance of 126.85 million new USAR shares. CEO Barbara Humpton played a key role in orchestrating this strategic move. For more detailed information, readers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.
